item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak sepenuhnya setuju dengan pendapat mereka.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society's interests should take priority, then shifts toward a balancing frame that gives more explicit weight to individual rights while still saying Indonesian practice often prioritizes society. Agent B consistently defends individual rights as constitutionally protected and shows little visible movement.
